name: Perch with Black Bean Sauce Jjgf65a I.e.s.
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sake or dry sherry wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a separate bowl, mix the black beans (whole or pureed with seasonings) with chicken broth until smooth.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add gingerroot, garlic, and onion to the pan and sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in chicken broth, sake, soy sauce, toasted sesame oil, black bean sauce mixture, and sugar.
5. Cook at a low boil for 5 minutes, then strain and discard solids.
6. Return the sauce to the pan and combine cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of black bean sauce mixture until smooth.
7. Stir into the pan and cook over low heat for about 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed by adding up to 2 tablespoons water (if too salty or thick).
9. Heat remaining oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Mix flour with white pepper.
10. Season the perch filets with the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off excess.
11. Sauté the perch for 3-5 minutes on each side until golden brown.
12. Place the perch on plates and top with black bean sauce.
13. Makes 2 servings.
